meta.note: Closest to Earth ~Feb 17 2026 at ~1 AU; low on the SW horizon. Telescope object.
The standout apparition of 2026. Flirted with naked-eye visibility in the predawn sky. Brightness highly uncertain — verify before shipping.
Jupiter-family periodic comet, ~5.4 yr orbit. Binocular/small-telescope object near perihelion.
Visible Sep–Dec 2026; Halley-type, ~21 yr orbit. Telescope object (mag 10–14).
Shortest-period known comet (~3.3 yr). Brightens late Jan–mid Feb 2027.
